[index.html.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27121456/index.html.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Nicole Brener — Brand & Marketing Strategist</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --orange: #E8541A;
    --orange-light: #FF7140;
    --cream: #FAF8F5;
    --dark: #111110;
    --mid: #3D3C39;
    --muted: #9E9B96;
    --border: #E5E2DC;
    --serif: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
    --sans: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--sans);
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--dark);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px 60px;
    background: rgba(250,248,245,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: var(--dark);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 36px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--dark); }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 0 60px 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-bg-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    right: -40px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(300px, 40vw, 500px);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: transparent;
    -webkit-text-stroke: 1px var(--border);
    line-height: 1;
    user-select: none;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--orange);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.2s forwards;
  }

  .hero-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(56px, 8vw, 110px);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    color: var(--dark);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.4s forwards;
  }

  .hero-name em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--orange);
  }

  .hero-tagline {
    font-size: clamp(18px, 2.5vw, 26px);
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--mid);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.6s forwards;
  }

  .hero-tagline strong {
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--dark);
  }

  .hero-cta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: center;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.8s forwards;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--dark);
    color: var(--cream);
    padding: 14px 32px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.25s, transform 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--orange); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  .btn-ghost {
    display: inline-block;
    color: var(--mid);
    padding: 14px 0;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--muted);
    transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--dark); border-color: var(--dark); }

  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 40px;
    right: 60px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--muted);
    writing-mode: vertical-rl;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .hero-scroll::before {
    content: '';
    width: 1px;
    height: 60px;
    background: var(--muted);
    display: block;
    animation: scrollLine 2s 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  /* SECTION COMMON */
  section { padding: 120px 60px; }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--orange);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 60px);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.05;
    letter-spacing: -1.5px;
    color: var(--dark);
    margin-bottom: 60px;
  }

  /* ABOUT */
  .about {
    background: var(--dark);
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  .about .section-label { color: var(--orange-light); }

  .about-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .about .section-title {
    color: var(--cream);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .about-text {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.75;
    color: rgba(250,248,245,0.75);
  }

  .about-text strong {
    color: var(--cream);
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .about-stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 40px;
    padding-top: 20px;
  }

  .stat-item {}

  .stat-number {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 56px;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--orange-light);
    letter-spacing: -2px;
  }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: rgba(250,248,245,0.5);
    margin-top: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* SKILLS */
  .skills { background: var(--cream); }

  .skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 2px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .skill-card {
    background: var(--cream);
    padding: 48px;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    cursor: default;
  }

  .skill-card:hover { background: #F0EDE8; }

  .skill-number {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--orange);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .skill-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 26px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: var(--dark);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .skill-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--mid);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* EXPERIENCE */
  .experience { background: #F2EFE9; }

  .exp-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .exp-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr auto;
    gap: 40px;
    align-items: start;
    padding: 40px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: padding-left 0.3s;
  }

  .exp-item:hover { padding-left: 12px; }

  .exp-period {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--muted);
    padding-top: 4px;
  }

  .exp-company {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--orange);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .exp-role {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: var(--dark);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    line-height: 1.1;
  }

  .exp-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--mid);
    line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 520px;
  }

  .exp-arrow {
    font-size: 24px;
    color: var(--border);
    padding-top: 8px;
    transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }

  .exp-item:hover .exp-arrow { color: var(--orange); transform: translateX(4px); }

  /* PROJECTS */
  .projects { background: var(--cream); }

  .projects-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 2px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .project-card {
    background: var(--cream);
    padding: 48px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    min-height: 320px;
  }

  .project-card:hover { background: #F0EDE8; }

  .project-card.featured {
    grid-column: span 2;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--dark);
    color: var(--cream);
    min-height: 280px;
  }

  .project-card.featured:hover { background: #1a1a19; }

  .project-tag {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--orange);
  }

  .project-card.featured .project-tag { color: var(--orange-light); }

  .project-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: var(--dark);
    line-height: 1.15;
  }

  .project-card.featured .project-title {
    font-size: 36px;
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  .project-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--mid);
    line-height: 1.7;
    flex-grow: 1;
  }

  .project-card.featured .project-desc {
    color: rgba(250,248,245,0.7);
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  .project-meta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .project-pill {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 5px 12px;
    background: var(--border);
    color: var(--mid);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .project-card.featured .project-pill {
    background: rgba(250,248,245,0.1);
    color: rgba(250,248,245,0.6);
  }

  /* IMAGE PLACEHOLDER */
  .img-placeholder {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 240px;
    background: rgba(250,248,245,0.05);
    border: 1px dashed rgba(250,248,245,0.15);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
    color: rgba(250,248,245,0.3);
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .img-placeholder svg {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    opacity: 0.3;
  }

  .img-placeholder-light {
    background: var(--border);
    border: 1px dashed #CCC8C0;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* EDUCATION */
  .education { background: var(--dark); }

  .education .section-label { color: var(--orange-light); }
  .education .section-title { color: var(--cream); }

  .edu-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .edu-card {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.1);
    padding-top: 32px;
  }

  .edu-year {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--orange-light);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .edu-degree {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--cream);
    line-height: 1.25;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .edu-school {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: rgba(250,248,245,0.45);
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }

  /* CONTACT */
  .contact { background: var(--cream); text-align: center; padding: 120px 60px 100px; }

  .contact .section-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 24px; }

  .contact-headline {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(48px, 7vw, 90px);
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    line-height: 0.95;
    color: var(--dark);
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .contact-headline em {
    color: var(--orange);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .contact-links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 40px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-bottom: 60px;
  }

  .contact-link {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--mid);
    text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }

  .contact-link:hover { color: var(--orange); border-color: var(--orange); }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background: var(--dark);
    padding: 32px 60px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .footer-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--cream);
    letter-spacing: -0.3px;
  }

  .footer-copy {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(250,248,245,0.3);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes scrollLine {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scaleY(1); }
    50% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleY(0.6); }
  }

  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(40px);
    transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
  }

  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 16px 24px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 72px 20px; }
    .hero { padding: 0 20px 72px; }
    footer { padding: 24px 20px; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; text-align: center; }

    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .about-text { font-size: 16px; }
    .about-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 28px; }
    .stat-number { font-size: 40px; }

    .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .skill-card { padding: 32px 24px; }

    .exp-item { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; gap: 6px; padding: 28px 0; }
    .exp-arrow { display: none; }
    .exp-role { font-size: 22px; }

    .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2px; }

    /* Featured cards stack vertically */
    .project-card.featured {
      grid-column: span 1 !important;
      display: flex !important;
      flex-direction: column !important;
      padding: 0 !important;
    }

    /* Any span-2 card */
    div.project-card[style*="grid-column:span 2"],
    div.project-card[style*="grid-column: span 2"] {
      grid-column: span 1 !important;
      display: flex !important;
      flex-direction: column !important;
    }

    /* 2-col inner grid → column */
    .project-card > div[style*="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr"],
    .project-card > div[style*="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr"] {
      display: flex !important;
      flex-direction: column !important;
    }

    /* Copy panels inside featured */
    div[style*="padding:48px; border-right"] {
      padding: 24px 20px !important;
      border-right: none !important;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08) !important;
    }

    /* Image panels — limit height on mobile */
    div[style*="grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr"],
    div[style*="grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr"] {
      max-height: 280px !important;
    }

    div[style*="grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)"],
    div[style*="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)"] {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr) !important;
    }

    div[style*="padding:24px 48px"] {
      padding: 16px 20px !important;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 16px !important;
    }

    .project-title { font-size: 22px !important; }
    .section-title { font-size: 36px; margin-bottom: 40px; }

    .edu-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
    .contact { padding: 72px 20px 60px; }
    .contact-links { gap: 24px; }
    .hero-bg-number { display: none; }
    .hero-scroll { display: none; }
    .hero-cta { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .about-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stat-number { font-size: 36px; }
    .exp-role { font-size: 20px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">NB</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg-number">NB</div>
  <p class="hero-eyebrow">Brand & Marketing Strategist · Madrid</p>
  <h1 class="hero-name">Nicole<br><em>Brener</em></h1>
  <p class="hero-tagline">
    <strong>Brand thinking.</strong> Data execution.<br>Real results.
  </p>
  <div class="hero-cta">
    <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">View Work</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-ghost">Get in Touch</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">Scroll</div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">About</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Strategy meets<br><em>story.</em></h2>
      <p class="about-text">
        I'm a Brand & Marketing Strategist with <strong>8+ years of experience</strong> leading campaigns that combine storytelling, data, and cultural relevance across B2B and B2C brands.<br><br>
        I specialize in brand positioning, multichannel strategies, and cross-functional leadership — working closely with creative, content, and media teams. From <strong>sponsorship activations to content-led campaigns</strong>, I bring a strategic and hands-on mindset to every project.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="about-stats">
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-number">8+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Years of experience</div>
      </div>

      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-number">500+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Attendees at brand activations</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-number">B2B &amp; B2C</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Expertise across sectors</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section class="skills" id="skills">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Core Skills</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">What I do<br><em>best.</em></h2>
  <div class="skills-grid reveal">
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-number">01</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Brand Strategy<br>& Messaging</div>
      <p class="skill-desc">Long-term brand strategies that combine positioning, storytelling, and cultural insights to build meaningful emotional connections — aligned with business goals and consistent across all touchpoints.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-number">02</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Cross-Functional<br>Leadership</div>
      <p class="skill-desc">Navigating matrix organizations, collaborating with creative, content, media, and product teams — as well as external agencies — to deliver seamless, insight-driven campaigns.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-number">03</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Campaign & Experience<br>Marketing</div>
      <p class="skill-desc">End-to-end 360 campaigns and brand activations that boost awareness and engagement. From large-scale sponsorships to digital-first launches, with creative consistency and local cultural relevance.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-number">04</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Editorial Voice &<br>Narrative Development</div>
      <p class="skill-desc">Brand narratives and content strategies that are both emotionally resonant and performance-oriented — from always-on messaging to campaign-specific storytelling.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section class="experience" id="experience">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Experience</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Where I've<br><em>worked.</em></h2>
  <div class="exp-list">

    <!-- Havas -->
    <div class="exp-item reveal" style="grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr auto; align-items:start;">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-period">Jan 2025 — Present</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Madrid, Spain</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">Havas Market España</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Brand & Growth Marketing Manager</div>
        <ul style="margin-top:14px;padding-left:0;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Strategic lead for a portfolio of 6 accounts across beauty, supplements, aesthetics, hospitality, and FMCG — main point of contact between clients and internal teams across TV, radio, paid media, content, and influencers.</li>
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Led end-to-end CRM and automation projects (strategy, Figma workflows, Brevo deployment) and 360° integrated campaigns — driving <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+25% revenue</strong>, <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+31% engagement</strong>, <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+24% conversions</strong>, and <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">−19% CPA</strong>.</li>
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Won new business with a <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">60% pitch conversion rate</strong> and ensured <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">95% on-time delivery</strong> coordinating multidisciplinary teams across creative, media, and digital.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-arrow">→</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Mastercard -->
    <div class="exp-item reveal" style="grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr auto; align-items:start;">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-period">Nov 2022 — Nov 2024</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Buenos Aires / LATAM</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">Mastercard</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Marketing Manager</div>
        <ul style="margin-top:14px;padding-left:0;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Managed full 360° brand and commercial campaigns for major banking and fintech partners across LATAM — from briefing and creative development to execution, budget allocation, and reporting.</li>
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Increased fintech conversions by <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+25%</strong> and card usage by <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+40%</strong> through test & learn frameworks, audience analysis, and portfolio optimization.</li>
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Coordinated product launches and activations with cross-functional teams (Brand, Media, Product, PR) in multicultural and matrix environments across multiple simultaneous markets.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-arrow">→</div>
    </div>

    <!-- American Express -->
    <div class="exp-item reveal" style="grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr auto; align-items:start;">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-period">Jan 2020 — Nov 2022</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Buenos Aires, Argentina</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">American Express</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Marketing & Brand Manager</div>
        <ul style="margin-top:14px;padding-left:0;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Led full-funnel, multi-channel brand campaigns across paid social, eCommerce, sponsorships, and loyalty programs — managing agencies and internal stakeholders end-to-end.</li>
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Card acquisition strategies drove <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+15% GDV growth</strong> in 3 months, <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+57% web traffic</strong>, and <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+43.5% redemptions</strong>.</li>
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Managed high-visibility sponsorship activations (Movistar Arena, ATP Tennis) tied to cultural moments, reinforcing brand equity and engagement.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-arrow">→</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Freelance -->
    <div class="exp-item reveal" style="grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr auto; align-items:start;">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-period">May 2020 — Aug 2025</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Remote</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">Freelance Projects</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Brand Strategist & Project Lead</div>
        <ul style="margin-top:14px;padding-left:0;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Brand strategy and relaunch of <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">JOOLZ</strong>: narrative definition, creative guidelines, and go-to-market plan.</li>
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Brand concept and launch strategy for <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">SMASH CLUB</strong> (premium padel + gastronomy) and creative campaign lead for <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">Belmo</strong> across content strategy and paid digital channels.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-arrow">→</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Rational AG -->
    <div class="exp-item reveal" style="grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr auto; align-items:start;">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-period">Jul 2018 — Jan 2020</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Buenos Aires, Argentina</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">RATIONAL AG</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Digital Paid Media Coordinator</div>
        <ul style="margin-top:14px;padding-left:0;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li class="exp-desc" style="padding-left:16px;position:relative;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--orange);">·</span>Executed paid social and email marketing campaigns across LATAM — <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">+25% B2B lead acquisition</strong>, <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">63% open rate</strong>, and <strong style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;">17% CTR</strong> — with localized messaging across regional markets.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-arrow">→</div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section class="projects" id="projects">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Projects</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Selected<br><em>work.</em></h2>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <!-- AML FEATURED — full width -->
    <div class="project-card featured reveal" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; padding:0;">

      <!-- Top: info + before/after -->
      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:0; align-items:stretch;">

        <!-- Left: copy -->
        <div style="padding:48px; border-right:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08); display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; gap:28px;">
          <div>
            <div class="project-tag">Ana María Lajusticia · Brand &amp; CRM</div>
            <h3 class="project-title" style="margin-top:12px;">Full Brand Relaunch &amp;<br>CRM Integration</h3>
            <p class="project-desc" style="margin-top:16px;">Worked alongside the brand's Marketing Manager to translate a full relaunch strategy into execution: rebranding, new product launches, tone of voice, social media content, CRM setup, and database segmentation. On the CRM side, built automated flows for every stage of the funnel: welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase with recommendations, cross-selling, repurchase, and behavioral interest flows.</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px; margin-bottom:28px; padding:24px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.04); border:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
              <div>
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:32px;font-weight:900;color:var(--orange-light);letter-spacing:-1px;">+4,280%</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(250,248,245,0.45);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Aumento en ingresos</div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:32px;font-weight:900;color:var(--orange-light);letter-spacing:-1px;">+7,133%</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(250,248,245,0.45);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Nuevos clientes</div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:32px;font-weight:900;color:var(--orange-light);letter-spacing:-1px;">87%</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(250,248,245,0.45);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Ingresos de nuevos clientes</div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:32px;font-weight:900;color:var(--orange-light);letter-spacing:-1px;">13%</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(250,248,245,0.45);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Clientes recurrentes</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-meta">
              <span class="project-pill">Brand Strategy</span>
              <span class="project-pill">CRM &amp; Automation</span>
              <span class="project-pill">Social Media</span>
              <span class="project-pill">Email Marketing</span>
              <span class="project-pill">Product Launch</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right: before/after feed -->
        <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:0;">
          <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column;">
            <div style="padding:12px 16px; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.06);">Before</div>
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="AML feed before rebranding" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:top; display:block;" />
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; border-left:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
            <div style="padding:12px 16px; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--orange-light); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.06);">After</div>
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="AML feed after rebranding" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:top; display:block;" />
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Bottom: email + automations -->
      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:180px 1fr 1fr; gap:0; border-top:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">

        <div style="padding:24px 24px; border-right:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08); display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3);">Email campaign</span>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AML email campaign" style="width:100%;border-radius:1px;" />
        </div>

        <div style="padding:24px 28px; border-right:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08); display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3);">Welcome flow</span>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Welcome automation flow" style="width:100%;border-radius:1px;" />
        </div>

        <div style="padding:24px 28px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3);">Abandoned cart flow</span>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Abandoned cart automation flow" style="width:100%;border-radius:1px;" />
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>


    <!-- JOOLZ FEATURED — full width -->
    <div class="project-card featured reveal" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; padding:0; grid-column:span 2;">

      <!-- Top row: copy + image grid -->
      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:0; align-items:stretch;">

        <!-- Left: copy -->
        <div style="padding:48px; border-right:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08); display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; gap:28px;">
          <div>
            <div class="project-tag" style="color:var(--orange-light);">Joolz · Brand Strategy & Rebranding · 2025</div>
            <h3 class="project-title" style="margin-top:12px; color:var(--cream); font-size:36px;">Full Brand Relaunch<br>& Packaging Production</h3>
            <p class="project-desc" style="margin-top:16px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.7); font-size:15px;">Led the complete rebranding of Joolz — from brand strategy and positioning to visual identity, tone of voice, and full packaging production across the product range.</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <!-- Before/After logos -->
            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:1px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08); margin-bottom:28px;">
              <div style="padding:20px 24px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center;">
                <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3); margin-bottom:12px;">Before</div>
                <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Joolz logo antes — rosa" style="width:100%; max-width:180px; height:80px; object-fit:contain; object-position:center;" />
              </div>
              <div style="padding:20px 24px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center; border-left:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
                <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3); margin-bottom:12px;">After</div>
                <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Joolz logo después — marrón" style="width:100%; max-width:180px; height:80px; object-fit:contain; object-position:center;" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-meta">
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Brand Strategy</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Visual Identity</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Packaging</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Positioning</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Go-to-Market</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right: image grid -->
        <div style="display:grid; grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr; gap:2px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.06); overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Joolz packaging range" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center; display:block;" />
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.06);">
            <div style="overflow:hidden;">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Joolz logo colour system" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center; display:block;" />
            </div>
            <div style="overflow:hidden;">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Joolz OOH campaign" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center top; display:block;" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Bottom: deliverables bar -->
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.06); padding:24px 48px; display:flex; gap:40px; align-items:center;">
        <span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3);">Deliverables</span>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:24px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Brand Narrative & Positioning</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Logo & Visual Identity System</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Full Packaging Range</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Tone of Voice & Creative Guidelines</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>OOH Campaign Concepts</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

        <!-- Mastercard Copa América — FEATURED FULL WIDTH -->
    <div class="project-card reveal" style="grid-column:span 2; background:var(--dark); color:var(--cream); display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; padding:0; min-height:auto;">

      <!-- Top row: copy + visual mockup -->
      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:0; align-items:stretch;">

        <!-- Left: copy -->
        <div style="padding:48px; border-right:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08); display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; gap:28px;">
          <div>
            <div class="project-tag" style="color:var(--orange-light);">Mastercard × Galicia · 2024</div>
            <h3 class="project-title" style="margin-top:12px; color:var(--cream); font-size:36px;">Copa América<br>2024 Campaign</h3>
            <p class="project-desc" style="margin-top:16px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.7); font-size:15px;">Led end-to-end strategy and execution as Project Manager — landing page, automated email flows, paid media, and performance optimization.</p>
            <div style="margin-top:20px; border-radius:2px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Copa América — Tenés la mejor hinchada" style="width:100%; height:auto; display:block;" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <!-- Results grid -->
            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:1px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08); margin-bottom:28px;">
              <div style="padding:24px 20px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center;">
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif); font-size:38px; font-weight:900; color:var(--orange-light); letter-spacing:-1.5px; line-height:1;">+23%</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.4); margin-top:8px;">Engagement</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:24px 20px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center; border-left:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08); border-right:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif); font-size:38px; font-weight:900; color:var(--orange-light); letter-spacing:-1.5px; line-height:1;">+25%</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.4); margin-top:8px;">Transaction Volume</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:24px 20px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center;">
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif); font-size:38px; font-weight:900; color:var(--orange-light); letter-spacing:-1.5px; line-height:1;">+30%</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.4); margin-top:8px;">GDV</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-meta">
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">360 Campaign</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Project Management</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Paid Media</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">CRM</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right: campaign images -->
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.06); overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="overflow:hidden; flex-shrink:0;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Copa América — Tenés la mejor hinchada" style="width:100%; height:auto; display:block;">
          </div>
          <div style="overflow:hidden; flex-shrink:0; display:flex; justify-content:center; background:#f8f4f0;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Copa América — Instagram story" style="width:auto; height:auto; max-width:100%; display:block;">
          </div>
        </div>

            <!-- Bottom: channel breakdown bar -->
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.06); padding:24px 48px; display:flex; gap:40px; align-items:center;">
        <span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3);">Channels</span>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:24px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Email Marketing</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Landing Page</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Paid Media</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>CRM Automation</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Performance Optimization</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- AMEX MEMBERSHIP REWARDS — FEATURED FULL WIDTH -->
    <div class="project-card featured reveal" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; padding:0; grid-column:span 2;">

      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:0; align-items:stretch;">

        <!-- Left: copy -->
        <div style="padding:48px; border-right:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08); display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; gap:28px;">
          <div>
            <div class="project-tag" style="color:var(--orange-light);">American Express · 2020 – 2022</div>
            <h3 class="project-title" style="margin-top:12px; color:var(--cream); font-size:36px;">Membership Rewards<br>Program</h3>
            <p class="project-desc" style="margin-top:16px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.7); font-size:15px;">Led the full marketing strategy for Membership Rewards — paid media, CRM automation, influencer partnerships, and Movistar Arena sponsorship activations to drive redemptions and reactivate cardholders.</p>
            <div style="margin-top:20px; border-radius:2px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="American Express — Puntos para alentar con sorpresa" style="width:100%; height:auto; display:block;" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <!-- Results grid -->
            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:1px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08); margin-bottom:28px;">
              <div style="padding:20px 16px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center;">
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif); font-size:28px; font-weight:900; color:var(--orange-light); letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1;">+60%</div>
                <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.4); margin-top:6px;">Web Visits</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:20px 16px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center; border-left:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif); font-size:28px; font-weight:900; color:var(--orange-light); letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1;">+30%</div>
                <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.4); margin-top:6px;">Open Rate</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:20px 16px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center; border-left:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif); font-size:28px; font-weight:900; color:var(--orange-light); letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1;">+15%</div>
                <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.4); margin-top:6px;">CTR</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:20px 16px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.03); text-align:center; border-left:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.08);">
                <div style="font-family:var(--serif); font-size:28px; font-weight:900; color:var(--orange-light); letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1;">+35%</div>
                <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.4); margin-top:6px;">Redemptions</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-meta">
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Paid Media</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">CRM & Automation</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Influencers</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Sponsorships</span>
              <span class="project-pill" style="background:rgba(250,248,245,0.08);color:rgba(250,248,245,0.55);">Retargeting</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right: image grid -->
        <div style="display:grid; grid-template-rows:1fr; gap:2px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.06); overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px; background:rgba(250,248,245,0.06);">
            <div style="overflow:hidden; background:#003087; max-height:220px;">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Membership Rewards email campaign" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:top; display:block;" />
            </div>
            <div style="overflow:hidden; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:#f5f5f5;">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="American Express paid social mobile" style="width:70%; height:100%; object-fit:contain; object-position:center; display:block;" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Bottom: channel bar -->
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(250,248,245,0.06); padding:24px 48px; display:flex; gap:40px; align-items:center;">
        <span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.3);">Channels</span>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:24px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Email CRM & Automation</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Paid Social & Retargeting</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Influencer Partnerships</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-light);display:inline-block;"></span>Movistar Arena Sponsorship</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<section class="education" id="education">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Education</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Academic<br><em>background.</em></h2>
  <div class="edu-grid reveal">
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">Madrid · 2024</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">Master's in Marketing & Commercial Management</div>
      <div class="edu-school">ESIC Business & Marketing School</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">Buenos Aires · 2020</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">Digital Marketing Certificate</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Digital House</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">Buenos Aires · 2016 – 2020</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">BA in Economics</div>
      <div class="edu-school">CEMA University</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">Madrid · 2019</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">Erasmus Program in Economics</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Universidad Carlos III de Madrid</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact" id="contact">
  <span class="section-label">Contact</span>
  <h2 class="contact-headline">Let's build<br>something <em>real.</em></h2>
  <div class="contact-links">
    <a href="mailto:nicolebrener1@gmail.com" class="contact-link">nicolebrener1@gmail.com</a>
    <a href="tel:+34666096297" class="contact-link">+34 666 09 62 97</a>
    <a href="#" class="contact-link">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="#" class="contact-link">@nicolebrener</a>
  </div>
  <a href="mailto:nicolebrener1@gmail.com" class="btn-primary">Say Hello</a>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-name">Nicole Brener</div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2026 · Brand & Marketing Strategist · Madrid</div>
</footer>

<script>
  // Scroll reveal
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 80);
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>
